name: markdown-sql-lint
description: Live PostgreSQL syntax checking for ```sql code blocks in Markdown files, powered by the real PostgreSQL parser (libpg_query).

markdownSqlLint.enable.description: Enable linting of SQL code blocks in Markdown files.

markdownSqlLint.fenceLanguages.description: Code fence info strings treated as SQL (case-insensitive).

markdownSqlLint.debounceMs.description: Delay in milliseconds after typing stops before re-linting.

markdownSqlLint.rules.keywordCase.description: Suggest a capitalization style for SQL keywords (shown as a suggestion, never an error).

markdownSqlLint.rules.requireSemicolon.description: Suggest terminating statements with a semicolon.

markdownSqlLint.rules.discourageSelectSt.description: Suggest naming columns explicitly instead of SELECT *.
